clauses.description: Root extensionsUsed array MUST list "KHR_gaussian_splatting".
asset.version MUST be "2.0" per glTF 2.0.
At least one primitive's extensions block MUST declare KHR_gaussian_splatting.
Primitive carrying KHR_gaussian_splatting MUST set mode to POINTS (0).
The extension object MUST declare a string `kernel`.
The extension object MUST declare a string `colorSpace`.
If `projection` is present it MUST be a string (default "perspective").
If `sortingMethod` is present it MUST be a string (default "cameraDistance").
Primitive attributes MUST declare a POSITION accessor.
Attributes MUST declare KHR_gaussian_splatting:ROTATION.
Attributes MUST declare KHR_gaussian_splatting:SCALE.
Attributes MUST declare KHR_gaussian_splatting:OPACITY.
Attributes MUST declare KHR_gaussian_splatting:SH_DEGREE_0_COEF_0.
POSITION accessor MUST be VEC3 (FLOAT or normalized integer).
ROTATION accessor MUST be VEC4 (FLOAT or normalized signed byte/short).
SCALE accessor MUST be VEC3 (FLOAT or unsigned-integer normalized variants).
OPACITY accessor MUST be SCALAR (FLOAT or normalized UByte/UShort).
Every SH_DEGREE_l_COEF_n accessor MUST be VEC3 FLOAT.
POSITION accessor MUST provide both min and max arrays.
SH degrees MUST be fully defined; using degree l requires degrees 0..l-1.
All per-splat accessors MUST share the same count.
Every accessor's bufferView byte footprint MUST fit inside its parent buffer.
All KHR_gaussian_splatting:* attribute keys MUST be defined by the spec.

clauses.detail: POSITION accessor missing min and/or max
accessor 3 needs 28 bytes but bufferView 3 has 16
primitive declares SPZ but extensionsUsed omits it
